.model jmitll jj(rtype=1, vg=2.8mV, cap=0.07pF, r0=160, rN=16, icrit=0.1mA)
LIN in s1 2p
B01 s1 g1 jmitll area=2.16
LP01 g1 0 0.086p
LRB01 g1 q1 0.086p
RB01 q1 s1 5.23
IB01 0 b1 pwl(0 0 50p 150u)
LPR01 s1 b1 0.278p
L01 s1 s2 2.425p
B02 s2 g2 jmitll area=2.16
LP02 g2 0 0.086p
LRB02 g2 q2 0.086p
RB02 q2 s2 5.23
IB02 0 b2 pwl(0 0 50p 150u)
LPR02 s2 b2 0.278p
LOUT s2 out 2.031p
ROUT out 0 2
VIN in 0 pwl(0 0 197.5p 0 200p 827.132u 202.5p 0)
.tran 0.25p 400p 0 0.25p
.print PHASE B01
.print PHASE B02
.print DEVI ROUT
.end
